catalog_row_proposal.Paper: Inflation in the Great Recession and New Keynesian Models
catalog_row_proposal.ModelType: Linearized medium-scale New Keynesian DSGE with financial frictions and time-varying inflation target
catalog_row_proposal.KeyFeatures: Smets-Wouters; financial frictions; credit spread observable; nominal wage and price rigidities; habit formation; investment adjustment costs; flexible-price/wage output gap; time-varying inflation target

status_row_proposal.paper_title: Inflation in the Great Recession and New Keynesian Models
status_row_proposal.raw_pdf_path: raw/mmb_papers/Infation in the Great recession and New Keynesian models.pdf
status_row_proposal.notes: Paper provides log-linear equilibrium conditions and refers full steady-state formulas to Del Negro and Schorfheide (2013); no Dynare runtime validation.
